title: Add Instagram link with logo

requirements.text: Add an Instagram logo that links to www.instagram.com/karan.pbx05/ - when users click the logo, they should be directed to this Instagram profile in a new tab

quotes: add at instagram logo www.instagram.com/karan.pbx05/ that if anyone click on it they obtain this id

acceptanceCriteria: Instagram logo is visible on the page
Link opens in a new browser tab
Logo is appropriately sized and positioned for user interaction

constraints: Use existing component architecture and styling patterns
nonGoals: Adding other social media links beyond Instagram
Creating a full social media section
Modifying existing social links in Footer component

required: Instagram logo icon in brand colors suitable for the app's cool color scheme (instagram-logo.dim_64x64.png)
